Write an ODCS v3 contract to a YAML file

Source: R/datacontract.R
write_datacontract.Rd

Convenience wrapper around to_datacontract() + yaml::write_yaml().

Usage

write_datacontract(x, path, info = NULL, servers = NULL, ...)

Arguments

x

See to_datacontract().

path

Destination file path.

info, servers

See to_datacontract().

...

Forwarded to to_datacontract().

Value

The contract list, invisibly.

See also

Other Data Contract: datacontract, datacontract_cli_available(), datacontract_export(), datacontract_lint(), datacontract_test(), from_datacontract(), read_datacontract(), to_datacontract()

Examples

if (requireNamespace("yaml", quietly = TRUE)) {
  define_model("Customer", fields = list(
    customer_id = field("integer", primary_key = TRUE),
    name        = field("character")
  ))
  tmp <- tempfile(fileext = ".yaml")
  write_datacontract("Customer", tmp,
    info = list(name = "customers", version = "1.0.0"))
  readLines(tmp, n = 5)
}
#> [1] "apiVersion: v3.0.2" "kind: DataContract" "id: Customer"      
#> [4] "status: draft"      "name: customers"
